eXtremeRate Replacement Front Housing Shell with Touchpad Compatible with PS5 Controller BDM-010/020/030/040/050/060 - Black

Regular price $20.99
Regular price $0.00 Sale price $20.99
Unit price /  per 
Sale Sold out
Free Shipping
4 reviews
SKU: ZPFP3009G4

 
 
 This item is a recurring or deferred purchase. By continuing, I agree to the cancellation policy and authorize you to charge my payment method at the prices, frequency and dates listed on this page until my order is fulfilled or I cancel, if permitted.

We know that your controller shell is more than just a plastic accessory.
It is your sidekick, your wing man, your battle buddy.
This is why we use only the best parts and themost vibrant paints to ensure our controllers are of high quality.
Believe me, your friend will admire you after installing this exclusive faceplate shell.

Read Before Purchase:
1.Please note that the DIY replacement shell is only compatible with ps5 controller BDM-010/020/030/040/050/060, NOT compatible with other model controllers (Please check the third picture of the listing before purchase).
2.This is just a faceplate shell and touchpad. The controller, back shell, decorative trim shell, buttons and other parts are not included.
3.Requires customers to take apart the controller original shell part to replace the front shell.
4.Tap here to check the installation guide video: eXtremeRate PS5 Controller (BDM-010/020/030/040) Front Shell & Touchpad Installation Guide

Product Feature:
1. Made of durable non-toxic ABS plastic. Odour free.
2. Completely fits flush on all sides; Sits properly on all the clips.
3. Personalize your controller.
4. It is a beautiful change up from a boring normal white without spending a ton of money.

Package Includes:
1* Face plate shell
1* Touch pad shell
1* Touch pad holder set
1* Open shell tool
1* Screwdriver
13* Screws

Note:
1. The controller and other parts are not included!
2. It is recommended to clean with a wipe with water. If alcohol is used, clean it with a wipe dampened with less than 70% alcohol and place it in a ventilated place to dry in time. Do not spray water or alcohol directly on the product surface. Do not use any other organic solvents for cleaning.

Cover controller ps5

Scocca bellissima, l’ho ricevuta danneggiata ma sono stati molto bravi e mi hanno inviato un’altra in perfette condizioni, ricevuta pochi giorni dopo

Ciao amico,
Grazie mille per il suo feedback positivo!
Siamo entusiasti di sapere che si è trovata bene con noi.
Fornire un servizio eccellente è la nostra massima priorità e siamo lieti di aver soddisfatto le sue aspettative.
La sua soddisfazione significa molto per noi.
Se dovesse avere bisogno di qualcosa in futuro, non esiti a contattarci.
Grazie ancora per il vostro supporto e ci auguriamo di potervi servire di nuovo presto!

R
Robert Gradinariu
Ps5 Controller black housing

The housing is very fine and looks good once you actually change to the housing. The edges also very well made, I barely feel them holding the controller. Though some downsides can be that the clips around the aux input can break, for me they actually broke though the housing is steady enough without them. If you‘re looking for a good housing I definitely recommend this one!

J
Jeremiah Jeremiah
Amazing

I love the texture of the shell. With every controller i’ve ever used my hands get sweaty and it’s super annoying to wipe off constantly. The material extreme rate uses is the best by far. It is beyond comparison to all Playstation, Xbox, and Nintendo controllers. I would highly recommend
